data.name: Cybernetic Seduction - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
Dive into a gripping story where special agents enter an entirely new world to pull off a grand theft. Your Target? Hector Zhine.
Make connections in the New Zhine City to infiltrate his criminal empire.
Assume the role of Agent Cock, a specialist in the art of seduction, tasked with weaving your way into Zhine's inner circle. However, seduction alone won't suffice, as each member requires a unique approach. Be trustworthy, reliable, and resourceful not only to charm your way into Zhine's family but also to gain the trust of his associates and employees. Convince them that you are the solution to all their needs and desires.



Discover the jobs and dates systems allowing you to forge deeper connections with your favorite characters.
Craft the perfect heist using a planning system that provides control and flexibility, culminating in a grand theft and thrilling shootouts!
Unleash your full potential as Agent Cock, ascending to new heights of pleasure with the revolutionary Morph superdrug. Offer unforgettable experiences to the women in your path as you navigate the engaging world of espionage and seduction.
Good luck, Agent!



Cybernetic Seduction - Season 1 features:
  • 6400 Full HD Renders,
  • 400 high-quality animations,
  • 33 sex scenes easily replayable in the Gallery,
  • 58 music tracks, over 100 sound effects, and 25 ambience tracks,
  • 50 sex sound effects to bring spicy scenes to life,
  • 60+ extra render rewards,
  • dynamic dates, jobs, and heist planning systems.

data.short_description: Cybernetic Seduction is a choice-driven futuristic adult visual novel filled with sex, humor, and action. Immerse yourself in a brand new world as a newbie agent with one clear goal: to seduce women. Impress the mafia boss, organize heists, and uncover the truth about the mysterious organization.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 Compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
